text: Hey Kayla, just want to give you an update. We are ready with the campaigns that we would like to launch. Tried yesterday but couldn't launch and here's the problem. If you go to your ad console that is campaign manager and then bulk operations this is the page you will see now from here this is the bulk file portal, right? You get to download bulk file and also you can upload bulk files to update or create new campaigns. If you see this button here, choose file button. It's disabled for some reason I have never seen this and which is why we couldn't create the campaigns yesterday. So as a next step what I'll do is I'll contact the support. I hope that I have the access. If not, I'll let you know but we'll try to contact them and see how we can fix it. Once that's fixed then we'll launch the campaigns. That is it. I just wanted to give you an update. Thank you.
